entries.title: Web Shell Intrusion Countermeasures
entries.summary: Immediate actions for detecting, containing, and eradicating adversary web shells on exposed services.
initial_actions: Place impacted service behind emergency segmentation controls.
Capture volatile process and network artifacts for forensic timeline.
Rotate service credentials and redeploy trusted image baseline.
entries.success_criteria: No unauthorized shell callbacks observed for two monitoring windows.

entries.title: Business Email Compromise Response
entries.summary: Rapid battle card for account takeover and fraudulent payment workflow disruption.
initial_actions: Suspend compromised mailbox sessions and revoke active tokens.
Block malicious forwarding rules and mailbox delegates.
Alert finance operations to hold high-risk transfer requests.
entries.success_criteria: No additional fraudulent transfer attempts after account hardening.
